Technical Specifications

Lumix S1H

Cinema Full-Frame Mirrorless Camera

SensorVideoAutofocusStabilisationViewfinder & DisplayHigh ResolutionConnectivityBuildIn the Box

Sensor

Type35mm Full-Frame BSI CMOS
Resolution24.2 Megapixels (effective)
Aspect Ratio3:2
Sensor Size35.6 × 23.8mm
ISO Range100–51,200 (extendable to 204,800)
Dual Native ISOISO 640 / ISO 4000
Dynamic Range14+ stops (V-Log/V-Gamut)

Video

Maximum Resolution6K (5952 × 3968) at 24/25fps
Cinema 4K (C4K)4096 × 2160 up to 60fps
4K UHD3840 × 2160 up to 60fps
Slow Motion180fps at FHD (1080p)
Colour Sampling4:2:2 10-bit (internal)
Log ProfilesV-Log L, HLG (Hybrid Log Gamma)
Anamorphic4K 4:3 (1.33×, 1.5×, 2.0×)
Recording LimitUnlimited (with cooling)
Netflix ApprovedYes — approved for Netflix Originals

Autofocus

SystemDFD (Depth From Defocus) Contrast AF
Phase DetectionPhase-Hybrid AF
AF Points225 areas
Eye/Face DetectionYes (Human, Animal)
AF Speed0.08 sec (wide)

Stabilisation

In-Body (IBIS)5-Axis Dual I.S. 2
EffectivenessUp to 6.5 stops
ModesNormal, Anamorphic 1.1×, 2×, 3×, 4×
E-StabilisationYes (Hybrid stabilisation)

Viewfinder & Display

EVF TypeOLED
EVF Resolution5,760,000 dots
EVF Magnification0.78× (35mm equiv.)
Rear Display3.0" Free-angle TFT touch LCD
Display Resolution1,840,000 dots

High Resolution

ModeHigh Resolution Mode (sensor shift)
Output Resolution96MP (12,000 × 8,000px)
RAW OutputYes (.RW2)
Frames Composited8 frames

Connectivity

Card SlotsDual UHS-II SD card slots
HDMIType-A full-size (6K RAW out)
USBUSB-C 3.1 Gen1 (power delivery)
Headphone3.5mm jack
Microphone3.5mm jack
Flash SyncPC Sync terminal
Wi-Fi2.4GHz / 5GHz
Bluetooth4.2 LE

Build

Body MaterialMagnesium alloy
Weather SealingDust & splash resistant, freeze-proof to –10°C
MountL-Mount (Leica / Sigma / Panasonic)
Shutter Speeds60 – 1/8000 sec (mechanical), 1/16000 (electronic)
Burst Rate9fps (AFS), 6fps (AFC)
BatteryDMW-BLJ31 (approx. 360 shots per charge)
Weight1013g (body only, with battery and card)
Dimensions151.0 × 114.2 × 96.0mm

In the Box

IncludedCamera body, Battery (DMW-BLJ31), Battery charger (DMW-BTC13), DC coupler (DMW-DCC17), Shoulder strap, Body cap, Hot shoe cover, USB cable

*Listed pricing is Maximum Retail Price (inclusive of all taxes)

  1. "Unlimited recording" applies when the camera is operated within the recommended temperature range and continuous recording is not interrupted by SD card capacity limits.
  2. 6K resolution and 10-bit recording require high-speed SDXC UHS-II cards with a Video Speed Class 90 (V90) rating for optimal uninterrupted performance.
  3. V-Log/V-Gamut provides 14+ stops of dynamic range, assuming proper exposure and calibration in post-production using Panasonic's official LUTs.
  4. Battery life is approximate. Testing conducted by Panasonic using CIPA standards with the DMW-BLJ31 battery. Actual battery life varies significantly based on configuration, usage, recording formats, and environmental conditions.
  5. The phrase "Netflix Approved" means the Lumix S1H meets the strict image capture standards for primary camera use on Netflix Original Productions, as listed on the official Netflix Partner Help center.
  6. Weather sealing (splash/dust/freeze resistant) does not guarantee that damage will not occur if this camera is subjected to direct contact with dust and water. Warranty does not cover liquid damage.
  7. Firmware updates may add new features or alter existing functionalities. Please ensure you are running the latest firmware version v3.0 or higher for full described performance.
  8. All established final assembly supplier sites are third-party verified as Zero Waste by UL LLC. Panasonic requires at least 90% diversion through methods other than waste to energy to achieve Zero Waste to Landfill designations.

* Quoted MRP is inclusive of all applicable taxes. Prices subject to change without notice.

* Actual product appearance may differ slightly from illustrations provided.

* Features, specifications, weight and price are subject to change without prior notice.

* Netflix approval applies to specific firmware versions. Consult Panasonic for current status.

* Battery life estimates based on CIPA standard measurements. Actual results may vary.
